creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


I committed your port, with several changes. 

First, I eliminated the unecessary patches, that's an ease of future 
maintenance thing. 

Second, I changed your perl commands to a mv/sed combo. That's a style thing, 
but since I was making changes anyway, I thought I'd throw that in.  

Third, I added several files to the DOCS section, most notably the 
gentoorc-example file that you carefully patched, but didn't install. :) 
I also tweaked your CP command a little because it wasn't actually installing 
all the files in the docs subdirectories. 

Otherwise, excellent work, thanks. You saved me having to do most of the 
work for this myself, since it was on my list.
